name: Morning Glorious Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray or grease the muffin cups.
In a medium mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt. Set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine carrots, apples, coconut, raisins, and walnuts. Add eggs, oil, vanilla, applesauce, and yogurt. Mix well.
Combine the flour mixture with the ingredients in the large mixing bowl. Mix just until moistened.
Divide the batter into 24 muffin cups. Bake for 20 - 25 minutes or until a tester inserted comes out clean. Remove the muffins from the pan to a wire rack to cool. Serve with softened or whipped cream cheese.
